name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added UniBridge_RuntimeStateProbe Action=Assert for read-only runtime watch/assertion rules. Assertions can check selected component values with equals, numeric comparisons, ranges, contains, regex matches, null checks, changed, and stable modes over bounded samples. Required assertion failures return success=false by default so BatchActions can stop safely.

### Changed

- Runtime state probe discoverability now includes runtime_assert, watch_assert, expect_state, and related aliases in Discover, ToolGuide, DomainCatalog, and BatchActions.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_RuntimeStateProbe samples live component SerializedProperty/reflection values without arbitrary C# execution.
- UniBridge_RuntimeProfiler measures bounded ProfilerRecorder samples for runtime performance triage.
- UniBridge_ContextSnapshot includes an agentBrief onboarding block by default.
- UniBridge_WorkSession captures optional compact loaded-scene semantic baselines and review data.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
